creator: beat@FreeBSD.org
text:
The virtualbox port has been renamed to virtualbox-ose to reflect that
	we are using the OSE version of VirtualBox. Also a seperate port for
	the kernel modules has been created.

	Please repo-copy emulators/virtualbox to emulators/virtualbox-ose
	and emulators/virtualbox to emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod.
